lesson: Inlining digest content directly into claude -p prompt eliminated error_max_turns completely. Phase 4 tribunal went from 3 consecutive crashes to 1-shot pass.
context: claude -p has a built-in max turns limit (~10-15). When tribunal needed to Read a file first (1 turn) then analyze (N turns), complex phases exceeded the limit. Inlining the digest into the prompt reduces turns to 1-2 since no file reading is needed.
